steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly states Klein created features “generally seen as flaws” — showing he deliberately included what photography's conventions deemed incorrect.

steps.title: Match the word to the signal
steps.content:
”Defied” means to resist or refuse to follow, which precisely fits Klein's deliberate choice to include elements considered flawed.

The other three either honor conventions (respected), examine without challenging them (reviewed), or prevent something (prevented) — none match someone deliberately creating unconventional work.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
